name: Liquid Glass
description: Apple-inspired premium glass aesthetic. Refined, dynamic refraction feel. Extreme blur values, dramatic opacity ramp, specular highlights. True black dark mode.
personality: pill + glass elevation + smooth motion + thin borders + vivid gradients

decorators.glass-panel: Frosted glass panel with backdrop-filter blur(40px), semi-transparent surface background, thin 0.5px border.
decorators.glass-card: Rounded card with extreme backdrop blur, specular highlight gradient at top edge, and subtle border opacity.
decorators.glass-nav: Sticky navigation with blur(20px) backdrop, dynamic transparency that increases on scroll.
decorators.glass-input: Translucent input field with frosted background, rounded corners, and blue focus ring with gentle glow.

glass-panel.description: Frosted glass panel with backdrop-filter blur(40px), semi-transparent surface background, thin 0.5px border.
glass-panel.intent: Use for large content areas and panels. The extreme 40px blur creates the premium Apple-inspired depth effect.

glass-card.description: Rounded card with extreme backdrop blur, specular highlight gradient at top edge, and subtle border opacity.
glass-card.intent: Use for cards that need the premium refractive glass look. The specular highlight at the top edge mimics real glass refraction.

glass-nav.description: Sticky navigation with blur(20px) backdrop, dynamic transparency that increases on scroll.
glass-nav.intent: Use for the primary navigation bar. The blur backdrop creates a floating, elevated navigation that feels premium.

glass-input.description: Translucent input field with frosted background, rounded corners, and blue focus ring with gentle glow.
glass-input.intent: Use for form inputs that should feel lightweight and integrated with the glass surface.
